title: centaurium ruthenicum
intro: Centaurium ruthenicum, also known as Kalmus or Gold Thread, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and for treating kidney and urinary issues, due to its high concentration of iridoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurium ruthenicum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating conditions such as cystitis, nephritis, and urinary tract infections. Centaurium ruthenicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
